report_name: Gartner Names LinkShadow a 'Visionary' in 2026 Magic Quadrant for Network Detection and Response

identities.name: Gartner
identities.description: Technology research and advisory firm that positioned LinkShadow as a Visionary in its 2026 Magic Quadrant for Network Detection and Response (NDR).

identities.name: LinkShadow
identities.description: Cybersecurity company recognized as a Visionary by Gartner for its 'Intelligent NDR' strategy and AI-driven CyberMeshX (CMX) platform.
